title: Verify AI Answers in the Datilio Workflow
summary: Datilio places Talk to Data beside charts so verification is one click, not a separate tool.

content.summary: Datilio places Talk to Data beside charts so verification is one click, not a separate tool.

body.text: Products that hide verification guarantee it will not happen. Apply rules, ask AI, build matching chart, compare, export or escalate mismatch. Archive pairs for samples until habit is automatic.

body.alt: Data visualization on a modern display
body.caption: Data visualization on a modern display. Photo: Unsplash

body.text: Apply rules, ask AI, build matching chart, compare, export or escalate mismatch.
Archive pairs for samples until habit is automatic.

items: Same filters for AI and charts always.
Start with simple totals before complex asks.
Teach verification before advanced AI features.

body.text: Managers demo live chart-checks in reviews to normalize behavior.
Verified prompt templates accumulate as team assets.
Datilio's layout makes verify-AI-on-chart the default path, not the exception.

meta_description: Datilio places Talk to Data beside charts so verification is one click, not a separate tool.
